SQL 실행하여 DB 데이터를 Record로 조회

processors.name: SQL 실행하여 DB 데이터를 Record로 조회

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM stock as totalCount
WHERE update_dttm >= DATE_SUB('${last_run}', INTERVAL 1 HOUR)
  AND update_dttm <  '${startTime}';
select count(*) as totalCount from stock;

Group Results by Bulk Error Type.displayName: Group Results by Bulk Error Type
Group Results by Bulk Error Type.name: Group Results by Bulk Error Type

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT *
FROM stock
WHERE update_dttm >= DATE_SUB('${last_run}', INTERVAL 1 HOUR)
  AND update_dttm <  '${startTime}'
ORDER BY update_dttm;
